name: slack-ai-reply-helper
description: A macOS desktop helper that drafts Slack replies from pending mentions, DMs, and questions.
author: Glen Lee

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,main,electron "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5174 dist/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:mac:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false -c.mac.forceCodeSigning=false -c.mac.notarize=false
